caption: A screen recording displays a video conferencing session where a presenter shares a digital canvas against a black background. In the upper right corner, a man wearing a headset and a dark shirt is visible in a small webcam feed. The main area of the screen features a concept map with circular nodes containing images and text connected by curved lines. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemeni" and "Future of Society by Systemeni." As the sequence progresses, the concept map expands. Initially, only a few nodes are visible, including one with a small image of a person and another labeled "Feeling Blocking." By the end, the map becomes more complex with numerous new nodes appearing, featuring labels such as "Self-care," "Self-acceptance," "Self-responsibility," and "Mental-Health." The webcam feed of the man remains constant throughout the process.
